case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. MICHAEL LUCAS ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CIVIL CODE 1788.60 (TRANSACTION ID # 200000756) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT LUCAS, MICHAEL AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-19-2019
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $146.75 INTEREST, $40.00 COSTS, (TRANSACTION ID # 200018173) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100037281), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC SERVED AUG-27-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LUCAS, MICHAEL AN INDIVIDUAL
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-08-2019 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $276.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 200000756) AS TO DEFENDANT LUCAS, MICHAEL AN INDIVIDUAL
DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE 1033 (TRANSACTION ID # 200000756) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS (TRANSACTION ID # 200000756) FILED BY ATTORNEY VOS, RYAN E.
DECLARATION RE: ACCEPTING COPIES IN LIEU OF ORIGINALS (TRANSACTION ID # 200000756) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT LUCAS, MICHAEL AN INDIVIDUAL
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT LUCAS, MICHAEL AN INDIVIDUAL
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $2,104.41 AS TO DEFENDANT LUCAS, MICHAEL AN INDIVIDUAL
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 200000756) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF CALCULATION OF ACCRUED INTEREST AND ATTORNEYS FEES (TRANSACTION ID # 200000756) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LUCAS, MICHAEL AN INDIVIDUAL $1,517.41 PRINCIPAL, $276.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,793.41, SEE SCANNED DOC
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $28.69 INTEREST, $.00 COSTS, (TRANSACTION ID # 200005533) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-08-2019 CONTINUED TO JAN-14-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JAN-14-2020 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
